title: KYC Verification Procedures
body_markdown:
## Verification Procedures (index page)

Lists sub-procedures: Verification Rules Vs Regulation & Flows, Document Acceptance,
Customer Status and Its Use, FATCA, Electronic Verification (EV), High-Risk Country
Verification, USA Verification Guidelines, Underage Procedure, ONFIDO Selfie,
Risk Status Handling for KYC, etc.

Index of links. No table refs.
